Dear Mr. Tan Wei Ming,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Software Engineer at Tech Innovations Pte. Ltd. (the "Company"). This offer is contingent upon your acceptance of our terms and conditions.

Your starting annual salary will be SGD 85,000, payable monthly. You will report directly to Dr. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, and your start date will be mutually agreed upon.

Please note that this offer does not constitute a project plan, and any changes to the project status will be communicated officially. You will be required to complete all onboarding procedures, including verification of your NRIC: S2345678B. For your security, you can access your employment details at https://techinnovations.sg/user/S2345678B.

You may contact us at +65 6123 4567 or via email at hr@techinnovations.sg for any further queries. Kindly confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing and returning this letter by the end of this month.

Yours sincerely,

Dr. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah  
Human Resources Manager  
Tech Innovations Pte. Ltd.
